title: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
summary: OpenKnowledge is an open-source, AI-first markdown editor (MacOS/Web/CLI) that combines a WYSIWYG experience with direct integrations for Claude, Codex, and other agents. It features built-in RAG, CRDT-based collaboration, and lossless ProseMirror-to-markdown conversion, aiming to replace Obsidian/Notion for team-based AI-assisted writing and knowledge management.
